name: com.gamestack
description: Localhost state/action server that lets gamestack skills (/playtest, /critique --lens=feel, /critique --lens=perf) drive a running Unity build. Loopback-only, editor-only by default. v0.2.0: adds input injection, snapshot/restore, and tagged breakpoints on top of v0.1.0's state observation + screenshot capture.

samples.description: Minimal MonoBehaviours showing how to subscribe to gamestack input events, expose state for snapshot/restore, and emit breakpoint hits.
